title: pgstat — I/O & Buffers Overview (PG16+)
description: Fleet genelinde pg_stat_io kirilimi. Top read/write yapan instance'lar, backend_type bazli analiz. Click → Instance Detail.

list.name: service_group
list.query: select distinct service_group from control.instance_inventory where service_group is not null order by 1
list.label: Service Group

targets.rawSql: select coalesce(sum(d.reads_delta) * 8192, 0) as value from fact.pg_io_stat_delta d join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = d.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null)

select coalesce(sum(d.writes_delta) * 8192, 0) as value from fact.pg_io_stat_delta d join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = d.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null)

select coalesce(sum(d.evictions_delta), 0) as value from fact.pg_io_stat_delta d join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = d.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null)

select coalesce(sum(d.fsyncs_delta), 0) as value from fact.pg_io_stat_delta d join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = d.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null)

select $__timeGroupAlias(d.sample_ts, $__interval), i.display_name as metric, sum(d.reads_delta * 8192)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from '$__interval'::interval), 0) as value from fact.pg_io_stat_delta d join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = d.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null) group by 1, i.display_name order by 1

select $__timeGroupAlias(d.sample_ts, $__interval), i.display_name as metric, sum(d.writes_delta * 8192)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from '$__interval'::interval), 0) as value from fact.pg_io_stat_delta d join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = d.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null) group by 1, i.display_name order by 1

panels.title: Top 30 Instance × backend_type × context (range içi)
panels.description: Hangi instance'da hangi backend_type/context en çok I/O üretmiş.

targets.rawSql: select i.instance_pk, i.display_name as instance, d.backend_type, d.context, sum(d.reads_delta) * 8192 as reads_bytes, sum(d.writes_delta) * 8192 as writes_bytes, sum(d.extends_delta) * 8192 as extends_bytes, sum(d.hits_delta) as hits, sum(d.evictions_delta) as evictions, sum(d.fsyncs_delta) as fsyncs from fact.pg_io_stat_delta d join control.instance_inventory i on i.instance_pk = d.instance_pk where $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) and (i.service_group in ($service_group) or 'All' in ($service_group) or i.service_group is null) group by i.instance_pk, i.display_name, d.backend_type, d.context order by reads_bytes desc nulls last limit 30
